heading: Grants for healthy school environments
label: 2695 Grants for healthy school environments
notes: Effective DateSubchapter effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.text: providing technical assistance for programs of the Environmental Protection Agency (including the Tools for Schools Program and the Healthy School Environmental Assessment Tool) to schools for use in addressing environmental issues; and

children.label: A
children.text: standards for school building design, construction, and renovation; and

children.label: B
children.text: identification of ongoing school building environmental problems, including contaminants, hazardous substances, and pollutant emissions, in the State and recommended solutions to address those problems, including assessment of information on the exposure of children to environmental hazards in school facilities.

children.heading: Sunset
children.label: b Sunset
children.text: The authority of the Administrator to carry out this section shall expire 5 years after .December 19, 2007
